packages.name: docs-index-keeper
packages.description: Keep a Markdown docs index in sync through pre-commit, CI, or one-off maintenance flows.

packages.name: semantic-release-beta
packages.description: Set up semantic-release-npm-github-publish with stable main releases and prerelease beta releases on a beta branch.

packages.name: gh-cli
packages.description: Use the GitHub CLI effectively for repositories, PRs, Actions, releases, and more.

packages.name: git-commit
packages.description: Create conventional commits with diff-aware staging and message generation.

packages.name: gallery
packages.description: Create photo galleries with AI-assisted layout curation and sequencing.

packages.name: promptctl
packages.description: Use promptctl for template-based prompt engineering, scoring, and workflow automation.

packages.name: fill-music-player
packages.description: Fill a portable music player with a curated random selection from a source music library while balancing formats, artists, albums, and capacity.

packages.name: product-builder
packages.description: Build a full-stack web application or SaaS product from a user description using production-oriented defaults.

packages.name: starter-rules
packages.description: Load and enforce hard rules for every oleg-koval/* starter: 300-line files, E2E tests, pre-commit hooks, Vertical Slice architecture, no comments, KISS/DRY/SOLID.

packages.name: review-past-performance
packages.description: Self-improvement loop that pulls the last 24h of ICM memories, git history, and skill analytics to detect repeated mistakes, slow workflows, and missing coverage, then proposes 1-3 concrete improvements.

packages.name: open-source-publisher
packages.description: Prepare an open-source repository for public publishing with a minimal icon, social preview image, GitHub Pages site, README standardization, CI/CD checks, release hygiene, and optional donation setup.

packages.name: viral-launch
packages.description: Set up a project repository and launch plan for shareable marketing, public launch readiness, and growth loops.

packages.name: search-console-indexing-audit
packages.description: Analyze Google Search Console Coverage CSV exports and correlate them with sitemap, robots, canonical, redirect, and noindex signals.

packages.name: cloudflare-block-countries
packages.description: Block specific countries via Cloudflare WAF Custom Rules using the Cloudflare API. Handles creating new rulesets and updating existing ones across single or multiple zones.

packages.name: obsidian-pr-sync
packages.description: Fetch open GitHub PRs assigned to you or requesting your review, and write a grouped, age-sorted '## PRs to review' section into today's Obsidian daily note. Idempotent — re-running replaces the section.

packages.name: obsidian-task-rollover
packages.description: Bullet-journal end-of-day task migration: copy unchecked tasks from today's Obsidian daily note to the next workday's note under '## Carried over', and mark them [>] in the source. Skips weekends, idempotent.

packages.name: daily-startup
packages.description: Run the full morning routine in one command: carry forward yesterday's unfinished Obsidian tasks then refresh today's PR review queue. Chains olko:obsidian-task-rollover → olko:obsidian-pr-sync.

packages.name: pr-lifecycle
packages.description: End-to-end workflow from committed code to merged pull request: push branch, create PR, monitor CI, respond to review, and merge cleanly.

packages.name: ci-debug
packages.description: Diagnose a failing GitHub Actions run: fetch logs, identify the root cause, apply a fix, and watch the re-run until green.
